mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT sum(r.after_amount) FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 1 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id JOIN ct_merchant b on r.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.parent_path like concat(#{parentPath},'%') ORDER BY a.user_id,r.amount_type),0) + IFNULL((SELECT sum(r.after_amount) FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 2 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id JOIN ct_merchant b on r.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.parent_path like concat(#{parentPath},'%') ORDER BY a.user_id,r.amount_type),0) as balance , 0 as freezeAmount

SELECT m.* FROM( SELECT a.user_id,a.user_name,#{dataDt} as data_dt,IFNULL(c.balance,0) as balance,IFNULL(d.balance,0) as freeze_amount FROM ct_merchant a left join (SELECT user_id,sum(change_amount) as balance FROM ct_merchant_amount_records b WHERE amount_type = 1 and b.create_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY user_id)c ON c.user_id = a.user_id left join (SELECT user_id,sum(change_amount) as balance FROM ct_merchant_amount_records b WHERE amount_type = 2 and b.create_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY user_id)d ON d.user_id = a.user_id GROUP BY a.user_id,a.user_name ) m LEFT JOIN ct_merchant_history_balance n ON m.data_dt = n.data_dt AND m.user_id = n.user_id WHERE n.id is null

SELECT IFNULL((SELECT sum(r.after_amount) FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 1 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id JOIN ct_merchant b on r.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.user_id,r.amount_type),0) + IFNULL((SELECT sum(r.after_amount) FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 2 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id JOIN ct_merchant b on r.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.user_id,r.amount_type),0) as balance , 0 as freezeAmount

SELECT user_id,sum(after_amount)as balance FROM ( SELECT r.user_id,r.after_amount FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type =1 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id UNION ALL SELECT r.user_id,r.after_amount FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 2 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id)m GROUP BY user_id

SELECT r.user_id,r.after_amount as balance FROM (SELECT max(id) as id, user_id FROM ct_merchant_amount_records WHERE create_time <= concat(#{dataDt},' 23:59:59') AND amount_type = 1 GROUP BY user_id )a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records r on r.id = a.id
